events.name: FC Augsburg at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund scored three goals in 15 minutes in the first half to power back from two goals down and beat Borussia Moenchengladbach 4-2 on Saturday for their first win in the last four Bundesliga matches.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund stage comeback to defeat Gladbach 4-2

video.headline: Jamie Bynoe-Gittens' goal puts Borussia Dortmund ahead

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Jamie Bynoe-Gittens' goal puts Borussia Dortmund ahead) 2023/11/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen cruised to a 3-0 victory at Werder Bremen on Saturday to take over the lead in the Bundesliga with a club record-equalling eighth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen back on top with 3-0 win at Werder Bremen

video.headline: Alejandro Grimaldo with a Goal vs. Werder Bremen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Alejandro Grimaldo with a Goal vs. Werder Bremen) 2023/11/25 ESHEET
